nasb.text: and the altar of incense and its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the doorway at the entrance of the tabernacle;

esv.text: and the altar of incense, with its poles, and the anointing oil and the fragrant incense, and the screen for the door, at the door of the tabernacle;

cnv.text: 香壇、香壇的槓、膏油、芬芳的香、帳幕門口的門簾、

ccb.text: 香坛和抬香坛的横杠、膏油和芬芳的香；圣幕门口的帘子；
